scenarios.title: Embedding Retrieval and RAG Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: Embedding models, semantic or sparse search, reranking, vector or graph RAG, retrieval training, corpus indexing, RAG pipelines, vector database clients, and retrieval evaluation.
scenarios.role: RAG-Retrieval covers reranker inference plus bundled preparation for embedding, reranker, and ColBERT retrieval-model training and distillation workflows.
scenarios.read_when: Read rag-retrieval when tasks mention RAG-Retrieval, rag_retrieval, RAG passage reranking, BGE/BCE/Gemma/MiniCPM reranker scoring, compute_score, rerank, RankedResults, embedding fine-tuning, MRL, teacher embedding distillation, reranker pointwise/grouped JSONL, RankNet/listwise CE, LLM-to-BERT reranker distillation, ColBERT training, colbert_dim, or MyopicTrap positional-bias retrieval experiments.
scenarios.best_for: Installed-package reranker inference with Reranker, safe no-download API checks, JSONL/YAML validation before bundled embedding/reranker/ColBERT training, and explaining current ColBERT inference limitations.
scenarios.avoid_when: Avoid rag-retrieval for generic vector database client tasks, unrelated RAG orchestration frameworks, production model serving stacks, or full benchmark/training execution when the user did not ask for RAG-Retrieval-specific workflows.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose rag-retrieval when the task is about RAG-Retrieval's reranker API, retrieval model training data/configs, BGE/BCE/LLM reranker workflows, embedding or ColBERT fine-tuning, or package-specific errors such as Reranker model_type/device/dtype behavior. Choose a vector database, RAG framework, or generic distributed-training skill instead when the task is not tied to RAG-Retrieval APIs, configs, or data formats.
